title: Tools+
description: This mod adds tools that don't get as much love as the classic iron, diamond, ect.
body:
Hey you! Yes, you! Want some stylish new tools! Well, you've come to the right place! Welcome to...

![Tools+ in big red text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/20e91e96bbf1acebe60adba068bdb861e069905a.png)

A minecraft mod that I have made with a little thing called [MCreator](https://mcreator.net/) that adds some new tool types! 
Lapis, redstone, copper, and amethyst!

Not sure if this mod is safe? Check the [Github Repo!](https://github.com/LogicalMeatbag/tools-plus/)

Now, lets get to the **_ACTUAL POINT OF THIS MOD,_** the tools. What tools do we have in this mod? 
_this was made with mcreator so bear with me on this_ 
but here ya go! heres the tools!

## Amethyst Tools

Amethyst Axe, a very strong tool, but has a LONG attack cooldown.
![Amethyst Axe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c59f95d42c85c6bfc6d3e944d376b57022a65d96.png)

Amethyst Hoe (why does this exist 🤔)
![Amethyst Hoe (yes i made all tool types)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/045a91a751635d7b03caf79a85a9dfdf2d3fd3e4.png)

Amethyst Sword. Pretty fast attack speed if i would say so myself...
![Amethyst Sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b94000f52d7078cda543c7a209c2a73e9657bc4.png)

Amethyst Shovel. Just a shovel, but made of amythest. Um, yeah...
![Amethyst Shovel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/805107eb5301b7881dbcb6e05de0c597d78c76fc.png)

Amethyst Pickaxe. Good pickaxe. Very good pickaxe. Extremely good pickaxe. THE BEST PICKAXE-
![Amethyst Pickaxe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6fbf26af1781d9959600885dc11d9692fd48bd3.png)


And we have more, but i am to 😴 to put them here. Find out yourself by downloading the mod!

**Note: This is a SERVER SIDE MOD and will only work when installed on the server and client**

Alright, go have fun with those tools!

This is also avalible on **CurseForge**! Check it out [here!](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/toolsplus-curseforge)
